resetConfirm.copy: Reset this category's learning? Start fresh — your honey stays.

categoriesList.lead: The tasks Whenbee learns for you. Rename anything, or remove what you no longer do. Past logs stay either way.

hints.steady: Slow to change. It leans on your whole history, so it fits when your pace stays consistent.
hints.balanced: The everyday setting. A fair mix of your history and your recent runs.
hints.reactive: Catches up fast when your pace changes, like after new meds, a rough night, or a new routine.

ahaCard.body_one: Based on your last {{count}} completed {{categoryName}} task, you run about {{multiplier}}×. No guilt — your brain thinks fast, execution just takes longer.
ahaCard.body_other: Based on your last {{count}} completed {{categoryName}} tasks, you run about {{multiplier}}×. No guilt — your brain thinks fast, execution just takes longer.

rangeBand.unlockLabel: Unlock where tasks land with Pro

notEnough.headline: A few more logs and you can aim here

picker.headline: Pick how close to aim
picker.sub: You land within ±{{band}}% now — every choice is tighter.

active.headline: Closing in
active.leverText: Your {{worstValue}} miss widest — tighten those first.

empty.accessibilityLabel: Set a goal — Whenbee coaches you there
empty.headline: Set a target and I'll coach you there
empty.sub: You land within ±{{band}}% now — aim tighter.

goalLocked.headline: Set a target and I'll coach you there
goalLocked.sub: The number to guess, your biggest miss, how close you are.
goalLocked.accessibilityLabel: Set a goal for this category with Pro — Whenbee coaches you to it

graduation.title: This number's honest now
graduation.titleAccessibilityLabel: Now an honest number. About {{minutes}} minutes.
graduation.sub: The learning bar filled — {{runs}} real runs in.

tierMeaning.raw: just getting to know your pace

maturityMeter.settled: A few more runs and this settles to one number.
maturityMeter.runsLeft_one: {{count}} more run sharpen this to one number
maturityMeter.runsLeft_other: {{count}} more runs sharpen this to one number

proHonestWeekTease.heading: Your Honest Week, every Sunday.
proHonestWeekTease.body: See where the hours really went — plan next week from the truth, not a guess.

recentList.empty: No completed tasks here yet — they'll show up as you log them.

caption.stabilizing: Your multiplier is stabilizing — good self-awareness.
caption.steady: Steady and consistent — your pace is predictable here.

trendChart.empty: Not enough logs yet — your trend appears after a few more.
